live_path.role: Parses CLI flags and forwards the raw owner argument into the service layer.
Coordinates owner resolution, base-record creation, routing-key derivation, and payload emission.
Derives effective owner and owner_source from the CLI owner argument or config defaults.
Builds the stored base record with only name, status, and owner.
Computes routing_key from the already-resolved owner and item name.
Copies the base record and appends owner_source and routing_key to form the emitted payload.

owner_source.logic: Return "explicit" when owner is present after strip(); otherwise return defaults["owner"] with owner_source "default".
owner_source.storage_role: Not storage-derived in the live path. sync_app.store.make_record does not emit owner_source.

routing_key.logic: Slugify owner and name, then join as '<owner>:<name>'.
routing_key.timing: Computed in sync_app.service.sync_item after effective_owner is resolved and before serialize_payload returns.

test_observations.observation: Explicit owner path emits owner='pm-oncall', owner_source='explicit', routing_key='pm-oncall:launch-checklist'.
Missing owner flag emits owner from config/defaults.json, owner_source='default', and routing_key based on that default owner.
CLI path preserves the same explicit-owner emission as the direct service call, showing the flag reaches sync_item before serialization.

Observed output: {"name": "Launch Checklist", "owner": "pm-oncall", "owner_source": "default", "routing_key": "pm-oncall:launch-checklist", "status": "pending"}; routing_key matches the explicit example because the current default owner is also pm-oncall.

rejected_decoys.reason: This helper would infer owner_source from a record, but no live caller reaches it. The live path passes owner_source directly into serialize_payload from sync_app.service._resolve_owner.
This legacy helper writes owner_source into a record, but sync_app.service.sync_item calls make_record instead.
This legacy routing helper is unused in the live path; sync_app.service.sync_item calls sync_app.serializer.build_routing_key.
